  1. ch.varani.bricks.ble.api

Uses of Package
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api

Packages that use ch.varani.bricks.ble.api
Package
Description
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api
Public API for the Bluetooth LE library for LEGO Powered Up and compatible devices.
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl
Fluent internal DSL built on top of the public BLE API.
ch.varani.bricks.ble.impl.macos
 
ch.varani.bricks.ble.util
 
  • Classes in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api used by ch.varani.bricks.ble.api
    Class
    Description
    BleConnection
    Represents an active BLE connection to a peripheral.
    BleDevice
    Represents a discovered BLE peripheral that has not yet been connected.
    BleException
    Signals that a BLE operation has failed.
    BleScanner
    Scans for nearby BLE peripherals.
    ScanCallback
    Receives BLE scan results as they are discovered.
  • Classes in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api used by ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl
    Class
    Description
    BleConnection
    Represents an active BLE connection to a peripheral.
    BleDevice
    Represents a discovered BLE peripheral that has not yet been connected.
    BleException
    Signals that a BLE operation has failed.
    BleScanner
    Scans for nearby BLE peripherals.
  • Classes in ch.varani.bricks.ble.api used by ch.varani.bricks.ble.impl.macos
    Class
    Description
    BleException
    Signals that a BLE operation has failed.
    BleScanner
    Scans for nearby BLE peripherals.
    ScanCallback
    Receives BLE scan results as they are discovered.

    Class
    Description
